reviews.school_name: Sarla Chopra Dav Public School - C Block,Sector 56

school_address.streetAddress: plot no :, A53A, Maithli Marg, ESIC Panchdeep Colony, Sector 56, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301, India

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: Parents, if you are reading this before making an admission for your child in this school, then I genuinely request you please don't. This school will ruin your child's future. Here the extra curricular activities are just for the name. Dance, Music, Art and Sports teachers only care about the students who are specialized in these fields. If your child doesn't have any of these talents, they are gonna sit through the whole class being ignored. The teachers are unnecessarily rude (except a very few) and pick out on students for absolutely no reason. There are no opportunities for kids. They only give attention to the children who are already smart. There are no trips or tours for the students ever (except a few educational trips for which they pick some students only).

reviews.school_name: Sarla Chopra Dav Public School - C Block,Sector 56
reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body:
To,
The Principal
Sarla Chopra DAV school, Sector 56, Noida
201301

Subject: Concern About Student Fight and School Management

Respected Sir/Madam,

For the last one week, Class X students have been fighting. These fights also happened outside the school, on the road and in a nearby park. One student was injured and admitted to a local hospital. This is a serious issue, but it seems the whole school is not aware of it.

Because of this and other problems, the school is losing its reputation. There are no sports activities, no quality education, and the school condition looks like PG rooms. Every morning during school time, no one manages the traffic outside the school, so people keep honking to clear the road.

I request the school to take immediate action, ensure students’ safety, and improve discipline for both senior and junior students.

Yours sincerely,
Dinesh

reviews.school_name: Sarla Chopra Dav Public School - C Block,Sector 56
reviews.author: PALAK BISHT
reviews.review_body: worst teachers, specially the teachers with high posts are very rude to children , no educational trips , no fun events and even after this no good teaching,  students have to completely rely on coaching and tutions , worst means worst , even the medical facilities are worst , medical mam has her own priorities and neglects students who are in need , cold water is not available in summers, fans are of no good quality with low speed , desks are in very poor condition, the quality of sport equipment are also very bad , students have to beg the sports teacher to even give them a new shettlecock, for the amount of fee they are charging its not acceptable , students have to adjust alot specially with the attitude of teachers , they do not want to teach but just want to scold children for no applicable reason ,cannot give a 0 that's why 1 otherwise 0 is what all it deserves, nowadays education a buisness ,playing with the careers of students   highly not recommending, 0 it is

reviews.school_name: Sarla Chopra Dav Public School - C Block,Sector 56
reviews.author: Ayushi kashyap
reviews.review_body: I have been there from literally LKG and the problem with the school is the old mentality they got like at starting they even used to change classes of just 4 year old kids so that they can make friends but what about the kid who are introvert and can't make friends easily. Then there is this girl boy issue like u can't even stand and talk to boys of u are a girl it is a crime for them. Then the comes some teachers who just wanna interfere in children's lives even when they are not at a school. I will tell you my case I was in a market near my house and was taking with some of my friends (boys) when I went to school next day the  teacher that saw me there just asked me to come and talk she literally said  apke Ghar Mai kya chal rha h like what why are u even asking that to a kid i responded in hesitation and then she said ladhkiyo ko ladhko ke sath nhi ghoomna chahiye and all that topical orthodox thinking.

reviews.school_name: Sarla Chopra Dav Public School - C Block,Sector 56
reviews.author: Abhay Dubey
reviews.review_body: Alright , so i am in this school since class 1 (12yrs now) honestly DAV was really good in the starting year but had a really bad downfall in year 2016 . From that year till today we students are just adjusting we dont have good sports teacher and the one we have they are not even capable of playing games themselves.  They force us to make braids , threaten us that we'll call your parents just because we did not do the hairstyle they wanted us to do .. infact during assembly the sports teacher pulls our hairs from the back and spank boys on their butt . They say this is a co-ed school but c'mon they dont even let us talk to boys ! They have a problem if we are running in our school uniform which is a suit and salwar " sharam nahi aati ladko ke saamne suit mein bhaagte hue " exact words of the teacher no culture activitiesno annual days not even a good library teachers judge us by our appearance . WORST SCHOOL EVER I AM GLAD THIS IS MY LAST YEAR . thank you so much , spread love no hate 😔👍

reviews.school_name: Sarla Chopra Dav Public School - C Block,Sector 56
reviews.author: Sanjeev Kumar
reviews.review_body: Worse experience with this school. They are using the DAV name only for making the money for nothing. Very few teacher are good otherwise this is the worst school in Delhi NCR. They don't have proper teachers last years post covid. No or irregular classes for certain subjects due to no staff. Class teachers even don't recognizes their students after 8-9 month teaching them. They have some most arrogant staff with them. If parent has any other option then go there but avoid SARLA Chopra DAV

reviews.school_name: Sarla Chopra Dav Public School - C Block,Sector 56
reviews.author: Shashank Bhatia
reviews.review_body: Great School for child to learn and grow among other children of mix levels of family backgrounds. Teachers are amazing. They focus on overall development of child and teaching fundamentals and correct application.
